title: Red Hat Security Advisory: poppler security update
overview:
An update for poppler is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: poppler security update

An update for poppler is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for poppler is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
poppler-20.11.0-5.el8_6.src.rpm
poppler-20.11.0-5.el8_6.i686.rpm
poppler-20.11.0-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm

poppler-qt5-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
poppler-utils-20.11.0-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
poppler-utils-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.i686.rpm
poppler-utils-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
poppler-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-cpp-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-debugsource-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-glib-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-glib-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-qt5-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-utils-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
poppler-utils-debuginfo-20.11.0-5.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm

CVE-2025-32365: A flaw was found in Poppler. This vulnerability allows out-of-bounds reads via crafted input files that trigger the JBIG2Bitmap::combine function due to a misplaced isOk check.
